Free Estimate
No-Pressure, No-Obligation

Get Your Free
Pest Estimate

Tell us about your pest problem and we'll schedule a FREE inspection. Honest assessment, no hidden fees, guaranteed results.

  • 🕐
    24-hour response time on all requests
  • 💰
    Completely free inspection and estimate
  • 🛡️
    Licensed & insured NYS technicians
  • ✅
    100% satisfaction guarantee on all work
  • 🌿
    Eco-friendly & pet-safe options available

We'll contact you within 24 hours. Your info is never shared.

🎉 Request Received!

Thanks! A Sasquatch technician will contact you within 24 hours to schedule your free inspection. Keep an eye on your phone and email!

Business Hours

Mon–Fri: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday: Emergency calls only
